summary: Bug fix verification PASSED: Remarks dialog now opens ON TOP of Lead Detail Dialog when clicking Discussion/Deal Closed/Lost stage buttons. The React state race condition fix is working correctly. All 16 stages visible, date filter functional, Final/End badges present.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: The fix at lines 1391-1394 correctly prevents Lead Detail Dialog from closing for intercept stages (Discussion, Deal Closed, RE-To Client, Lost, etc.)
The setViewLeadDialog(false) is now only called AFTER remarks submission in handleRemarksStageMove (line 384), not when the intercept stage button is clicked

test_credentials.Sales: Demo Access -> Quick Access -> 'Sales' button (Divya Pillai)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. Remarks dialog intercept working for Discussion, Deal Closed, Lost stages. 16 stages confirmed: New Appointment, Follow-up, Discussion, Site Visit, Site Visit (Client Land), Site Visit (Our Projects), Site Visit Done, Rough Estimate Requested, RE - From Planning, RE - To Client, Negotiation, Deal Closed, Payment Collect, Accountant Approval, Project Onboarded, Lost. Date filter working. Leads in Follow-up: Harini, TEST_RoughReq_ef8f94, Vinoth Kumar, Mrs. Meena, Mrs. Malar.

Bug Fix: Remarks dialog opens on top of.details: Clicking Discussion button from Lead Detail Dialog opens Remarks popup ON TOP without closing Lead Detail. Cancel closes only Remarks dialog.

Bug Fix: Deal Closed dialog intercept.details: Deal Closed button opens remarks dialog with title 'Deal Closed', remarks textarea, and 'Move to Deal Closed' button

Bug Fix: Lost dialog intercept.details: Lost button opens dialog with title 'Mark as Lost', red styling, lost reason textarea, and 'Mark as Lost' button

16 Stages visible in Kanban.details: All 16 stages visible with correct ordering and horizontal scrolling

Date filter functionality.details: Date filter, date end filter, and Today button all working. Filter correctly shows 2 leads for today vs 8 leads total

Final/End badges.details: Project Onboarded shows 'Final' badge, Lost shows 'End' badge

Lead Detail Dialog.details: Opens correctly via eye icon, shows lead info, tabs (Overview, Summary, Follow-ups, Remarks), and stage buttons

Cancel button behavior.details: Cancel on Remarks/Lost dialog closes only that dialog, Lead Detail stays open
